import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    ops = []
    
    def rev(p):
        ops.append(p)
        a[:p] = a[:p][::-1]
    
    k = n
    while k >= 3:
        big = k
        small = k - 1
        pos_big = a.index(big)
        if pos_big % 2 == 1:
            rev(pos_big)
        pos_big = a.index(big)
        if pos_big != 0:
            rev(pos_big + 1)
        rev(k)
        pos_small = a.index(small)
        if pos_small % 2 == 0:
            rev(pos_small + 1)
        pos_small = a.index(small)
        rev(pos_small)
        rev(k - 1)
        k -= 2
    
    if a != list(range(1, n+1)):
        print(-1)
    else:
        print(len(ops))
        if ops:
            print(*ops)
        else:
            print()

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
